obligations.rule: The function must validate standard email formats correctly.
The function must handle the `allow_display_name` option correctly.
obligations.why: The README specifies support for display names in email validation.

obligations.rule: The function must enforce the `require_display_name` option.
obligations.why: The README specifies rejection of emails without display names when this option is enabled.

obligations.rule: The function must respect the `allow_utf8_local_part` option.
obligations.why: The README specifies support for UTF-8 characters in the local part.

obligations.rule: The function must enforce the `require_tld` option.
obligations.why: The README specifies rejection of emails without a TLD when this option is enabled.

obligations.rule: The function must respect the `allow_ip_domain` option.
obligations.why: The README specifies support for IP addresses in the domain part.

obligations.rule: The function must enforce the `ignore_max_length` option.
obligations.why: The README specifies ignoring the standard max length when this option is enabled.

test_groups.title: Standard email validation
test_groups.rationale: Covers the baseline validation of standard email formats.

test_groups.title: Display name handling
test_groups.rationale: Tests the `allow_display_name` option for valid and invalid display name formats.

test_groups.title: Require display name
test_groups.rationale: Tests the `require_display_name` option to ensure emails without display names are rejected.

test_groups.title: UTF-8 local part handling
test_groups.rationale: Tests the `allow_utf8_local_part` option for UTF-8 characters in the local part.

test_groups.title: Require TLD
test_groups.rationale: Tests the `require_tld` option to ensure emails without TLDs are rejected.

test_groups.title: Allow IP domain
test_groups.rationale: Tests the `allow_ip_domain` option for IP addresses in the domain part.

test_groups.title: Ignore max length
test_groups.rationale: Tests the `ignore_max_length` option to ensure emails exceeding the standard length are accepted.

test_groups.title: Display name with illegal characters
test_groups.rationale: Tests the `validateDisplayName` function to ensure display names with illegal characters are properly quoted and escaped.

test_groups.title: Host blacklist and whitelist combination
test_groups.rationale: Tests the behavior when both `host_blacklist` and `host_whitelist` options are provided.

test_groups.title: Blacklisted characters in local part
test_groups.rationale: Tests the `blacklisted_chars` option to ensure emails containing blacklisted characters in the local part are rejected.

test_groups.title: Display name with spaces only
test_groups.rationale: Tests the `validateDisplayName` function to ensure display names with only spaces are rejected.

test_groups.title: Invalid bracketed domain
test_groups.rationale: Tests the handling of domains enclosed in brackets without valid IPs.

test_groups.title: Host blacklist with regex patterns
test_groups.rationale: Tests the `host_blacklist` option to ensure regex patterns are correctly applied.
